title: Divider
description: Horizontal or vertical separator line, optionally with a centered label or icon.

orientations.title: Orientations
orientations.desc: Horizontal by default; vertical when the host is flex/grid.

label.title: With label and icon
label.desc: Insert a centered label or icon (horizontal only).

variants.title: Line variants
variants.desc: Solid, dashed and dotted for different hierarchy levels.

emphasis.title: Emphasis
emphasis.desc: Controls the line contrast against the background.

props.label: Inline label (horizontal orientation only).
props.icon: Optional icon next to the label.
props.labelAlign: Position of the label inside the divider.
props.decorative: If decorative, it's ignored by assistive tech.

slots.default: Inline content alternative to the label prop.
